hero.subtitle: Over two decades manufacturing high-precision carton dies for the packaging industry. Quality, punctuality and personalized service in every project.

about_modal.title: Hores Cartotécnica
about_modal.p1: Hores Cartotécnica has spent over 20 years manufacturing cutting and creasing dies for the carton packaging industry, combining state-of-the-art technology with the artisanal knowledge of our specialized technicians.
about_modal.p2: Our dies are used in production lines for boxes, cases and displays across the food, pharmaceutical, cosmetics and industrial sectors. Each piece is custom-made with precision tolerances of up to ±0.1 mm.
about_modal.p3: We accompany our clients from die design through to line commissioning, ensuring maximum efficiency from the very first strike.

historia.title: Over two decades of precision
historia.hero_subtitle: Discover the journey we have taken from our founding in 2001 to becoming a regional benchmark in the manufacture of precision carton dies.
historia.tl_2001_desc: Hores Cartotécnica was founded in Buenos Aires with a 200 m² workshop and two specialised technicians, focused on the artisanal manufacture of dies for cardboard packaging.
historia.tl_2005_desc: We incorporated our first 5-axis CNC milling machine, tripling productive capacity and achieving tolerances of ±0.2 mm in medium-sized runs.
historia.tl_2009_desc: First exports to the Uruguayan and Chilean markets. The plant area grew to 800 m² with the addition of 12 qualified operators.
historia.tl_2013_desc: Obtaining ISO 9001:2008 certification formalised our quality control and traceability processes for every die manufactured.
historia.tl_2017_desc: We inaugurated our current 2,400 m² plant at the La Matanza Industrial Park, incorporating laser cutting technology and integrated CAD/CAM systems.
historia.tl_2021_desc: We implemented our digital management system: real-time order tracking, client portal and full traceability from design through to delivery.
historia.tl_2024_desc: Over 500 dies manufactured per year, presence in 6 countries, and a portfolio of more than 150 active clients across the food, pharmaceutical, cosmetics and industrial sectors.
historia.mission_text: To supply the packaging industry with high-precision carton dies that maximise our clients' productive efficiency, guaranteeing consistent quality, on-time delivery and specialised technical support at every stage of the project.
historia.vision_text: To be the reference supplier in Latin America for the manufacture of cutting and creasing dies, recognised for the precision of our products, the robustness of our processes, and the trust we build in every long-term commercial relationship.
historia.v_precision_desc: Tolerances of ±0.1 mm on every piece. Accuracy is not a goal — it is our baseline.
historia.v_compromiso_desc: We meet agreed deadlines. When we quote a date, it is because we have already calculated every variable in the process.
historia.v_agilidad_desc: Prototypes in 48 h, production runs in 5 business days. We adapt our production pace to the client's pace.
historia.v_cercania_desc: Every client has a dedicated technician. No tickets — you talk directly with the person who makes your die.
historia.v_mejora_desc: We reinvest 8% of annual revenue in machinery and training. Today's technology is tomorrow's standard.
historia.v_calidad_desc: Active ISO 9001. Every batch passes dimensional, material and cut testing before leaving the plant.
historia.sectors_text: Our dies are used in production lines for boxes, cases, displays and trays across four major industrial sectors.
historia.sectors_b1: Boxes for refrigerated and dry food products
historia.sectors_b2: Cases for medicines and medical devices
historia.sectors_b3: Premium packaging for cosmetics and perfumery
historia.sectors_b4: Industrial boxes for logistics and transport
historia.clients_subtitle: A selection of the companies we work with across different industrial sectors.
historia.countries_geo: Today, CARTOTÉCNICA HORES production is sold throughout Argentina as well as in different countries of the Americas, including Bolivia, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Uruguay, Mexico and Paraguay.
historia.obj_expansion_desc: Achieve active presence in Mexico, Colombia and Peru before 2027, with local technical representatives in each market.
historia.obj_planta_desc: Double installed capacity with a second automated production line to meet growing demand from the pharmaceutical sector.
historia.obj_industria40_desc: Integrate digital twins and real-time monitoring of every machine, reducing setup times by 30% by 2026.
historia.obj_iso14001_desc: Obtain environmental certification by end of 2025, consolidating our policy of clean production and zero waste.
historia.footer_location: Buenos Aires, Argentina · La Matanza Industrial Park

testimonios.title: What our clients say
testimonios.subtitle: Over 150 companies trust Hores for their production lines.
testimonios.t1_quote: The quality of the dies is exceptional. From the very first order we noticed the difference in cut precision and the time we gained on the production line.
testimonios.t2_quote: The technical support is second to none. Always available for last-minute adjustments and delivery deadlines are met without exception.
testimonios.t3_quote: We have worked with Hores for 8 years. We changed supplier once and came back. There is simply no comparison in this industry.
testimonios.t4_quote: We comply with very strict quality certifications and Hores always delivers dies that exceed them. A key strategic partner for our company.

video.subtitle: Watch how we manufacture every die with millimetre precision, from design through to the finished product.

curriculum.title: Join Our Team
curriculum.subtitle: We are looking for professionals committed to precision and quality. If you want to grow in the packaging industry, send us your CV.
curriculum.perk_1: Over 20 years of experience in a highly specialized technical sector.
curriculum.perk_2: State-of-the-art manufacturing technology with ISO-certified processes.
curriculum.perk_3: Collaborative team with real opportunities for professional growth.
curriculum.perk_4: Plant-floor work with varied and challenging projects on every shift.

calidad.title: Commitment to Excellence
calidad.subtitle: Seriousness, efficiency and food safety are the pillars guiding every decision at Hores Cartotécnica.
calidad.seriedad_p1: Trust is the value that CARTOTECNICA HORES strives to provide to each of its clients. That is why seriousness and efficiency have been established as working standards.
calidad.seriedad_p2: These values are present in each of the particular areas of action that give meaning to the general and integrated functioning of the company.
calidad.seriedad_p3: Starting with the productive process, the result of the most harmonious and effective combination of man and technology; continuing through the administrative, commercial and financial sections of the company, until finally reaching its strategic apex.
calidad.seriedad_p4: There, seriousness and efficiency gain intensity as it is the place where the main decisions that affect the company's future prospects come to life.
calidad.seriedad_p5_pre: Proof of this is the decision to
calidad.seriedad_p5_bold: certify Hores' Food Safety Management System according to ISO 22000:2018 standards.
calidad.inocuidad_p1_rest: is a company with a long track record, a benchmark in the national market for paper molds for the food industry.
calidad.inocuidad_p2: Committed to the food safety of its products, it strives to maintain and continuously improve its Food Safety Management System according to ISO 22000:2018, with the priority goal of achieving:
calidad.inocuidad_b1: Safe products through control of its processes.
calidad.inocuidad_b2: Compliance with legal, regulatory and client requirements, promoting the satisfaction of all interested parties.
calidad.inocuidad_b3: Effectiveness and continuous improvement in all its processes.
calidad.inocuidad_b4: That the people who are part of Cartotécnica Hores work in a committed manner with the FSMS, promoting a safe and comfortable work environment, fostering fluid internal and external communication, and mainly generating the necessary competencies not only to ensure the safety of its products but also to achieve career development, making continuous training, teamwork and motivation transversal axes for the company.

footer.description: Manufacturers of precision carton dies for the packaging industry. Over 20 years of experience and guaranteed quality.
